title: Good links: 22 September 2024
summary: Nic Chan - Nic has just finished rebuilding her website and it’s INCREDIBLE! Seriously just look at it CSS { In Real Life } | Limitation Breeds Creativity: A Study in Composition with Custom Properties - Michelle has done some (characteristically) amazing things with a handful of divs. Introducing @bramus/caniuse-cli, a CLI tool for “Can I Use …” - This is…
content:
• Nic Chan - Nic has just finished rebuilding her website and it’s INCREDIBLE! Seriously just look at it
  • CSS { In Real Life } | Limitation Breeds Creativity: A Study in Composition with Custom Properties - Michelle has done some (characteristically) amazing things with a handful of divs.
  • Introducing @bramus/caniuse-cli, a CLI tool for “Can I Use …” - This is going to be very useful!
  • Selling a small front-end web project — what I learned - Alistair Shepherd - “In mid-2024 I sold a small unmonetised web project of mine called My Top for Spotify. This is my experience of the sale and what I learned!”
  • http:, ftp:, and ... dict:? - Terence uncovers a long-forgotten protocol.
